parsed_review.summary: CP00-308 is a descriptor-only CRM-core fixture slice (RP09.P05.M05.S08-S17, "Permission And Audit Binding" middle rows: denied/cross-tenant/missing-context cases, audit hint, security trimming, AI retrieval/analytics, fixture manifest, golden/failure tests, Hermes fixture evidence). Verified end-to-end via Read/Grep/Glob only. (1) Plan/contract/code alignment: the live closeout-pack-plan.json CP00-308 entry (10 units; deliverable distribution implementation:4, security_audit:2, fixture:1, test:2, hermes_evidence:1; micro_title Permission And Audit Binding:10) matches the manifest plan_binding_snapshot, CRM_CORE_CP308_PACK_BINDING/REQUIREMENTS in registry.js, and the crm-core-contract.json current_pack + fixture_slice_descriptor projection. (2) Implementation: createCrmCoreCp308FixtureSliceCaseSet/Descriptor (service.js) generate all 10 rows as descriptor_only:true, runtime_execution:false, customer_safe_errors_only:true, raw_payload_included:false, with CP308 ROW_EXTRAS inheriting CP307 per-row guards (permission_decision_detail_included:false, cross_tenant_access_allowed:false, audit_hint_detail_included:false, unauthorized_data_omitted:true, dispatches_ai_runtime:false, emits_hermes_runtime_receipt:false). (3) Validators (validators.js) enforce coverage drift, per-row leak guards, authority boundary, and handoff target; Hermes/Claude/Closeout packet builders exist and are exported via index.js wildcard re-export. (4) validate-rp09-crm-core-contract.mjs deepEquals generated descriptor/requirements/no_write_attestation against the contract, asserts coverage.valid, descriptor-only rows, claude_is_final_approval:false, read_only Claude packet, and historical binding tail CP00-308; command-evidence.json records node --check/--test, rp05-rp09 validates, closeout-pack-plan/weighted/spec/control-plane/goal/fullplan validates, npm test, npm run validate/build, and git diff --check all at exit_code 0. (5) Tests validate against the live plan and contract files, not hand-rolled fixtures. Boundary posture is correct and not weakened: pack-level production_ready:false with flag crm_core_fixture_slice_descriptor_verified (no production-readiness over-claim); no-write/no-real-data/no-runtime/no-Hermes-runtime-receipt attested in code and contract; Claude remains read-only independent reviewer (claude_is_final_approver:false, promotes_claude_to_final_approval:false); enterprise trust not claimed from local validation and human final approval preserved; Hermes patterns used only for deterministic descriptor review-packet/receipt evidence (H09 gate), not product runtime. The Hermes production_ready_candidate:true is a descriptor-coverage signal, not a production_ready=true claim. Review integrity: readiness auth_preflight passed with valid JSON result; this review is read-only; post-review artifacts (claude-review-result.json/adjudication.md/construction-inspection.json) are correctly absent at this pre-review stage. No P0/P1/P2/P3 findings.
